title: Chart Suggestion: Improve Bubble Chart Axis Formatting Options - negative numbers and fixed axis

posts.author: FrederickB (Frederick)
posts.cookedHtml:
Two in one, but both suggestions easy to understand:

  1. Enable axis to include negative values. Right now, they only support positive numbers, so bubbles plotted with a negative x or y value are not shown.

  2. Enable the axis limits to be fixed instead of automatically stretched to fit data.

If I could have only one implemented, #1 is my priority.

posts.author: AdrianPareja (Adrián Pareja Ureña)
posts.cookedHtml: 2024 and still needing these two

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@FrederickB @AdrianPareja y axis is finally here (just discovered this)
